spoken_math.proposed: If f is the function defined by $f(x) = \frac{2x - 1}{3}$, what is the value of $f(5)$?
spoken_math.note: LaTeX is mathematically identical to spoken form. Syntax valid.

spoken_math.proposed: For the function f, if $f(3x) = x - 6$ for all values of x, what is the value of $f(6)$?
spoken_math.note: LaTeX is mathematically identical to spoken form. Syntax valid.

spoken_math.proposed: If a and c are positive numbers, which of the following is equivalent to $\sqrt{(a + c)^3} \times \sqrt{a + c}$?
spoken_math.note: Correctly converts spoken form and fixes literal '$\sqrt{a plus c}$' bug. Syntax valid.

spoken_math.proposed: Let the function p be defined as $p(x) = \frac{(x - c)^2 + 160}{2c}$, where c is a constant. If $p(c) = 10$, what is the value of $p(12)$?
spoken_math.note: LaTeX is mathematically identical to spoken form. Verified against rationale (c=8, p(12)=11). Syntax valid.
